title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Reference Role: Use Image 1 as the only identity source. Preserve face structure, eye spacing, nose, lips, jawline, hairline, and natural age impression across all portraits. Theme: Four dramatic photorealistic character portraits in one coherent world. Shared World: rainy neon city alley expanded from the original street background expands naturally from the uploaded photo background instead of replacing it with an unrelated scene. Character Set: Create four distinct roles: detective, fugitive, nightclub singer, and rooftop lookout. Wardrobe and Props: dark coats, satin collar details, leather gloves, and subtle noir props, varied per portrait but visually coherent. Composition: 2x2 cinematic portrait grid, mid close-up framing, low-angle and tilted wide-angle portrait crops, powerful complex poses, crisp textures. Lighting and Grade: blue-magenta neon with wet reflections and hard rim light, high contrast, precise color grading throughout. Restrictions: Same face in all four portraits, no identity drift, no cartoon style, no merged bodies, no distorted hands, no random text.
